hero.subtitle: Front-end developer and web designer. I create fast, beautiful, and responsive digital experiences.
hero.description1: I started my journey with passion, and today I've completed over 25 websites with diverse ideas and technologies.
hero.description2: I help you turn your idea into reality — with professionalism and excellence.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle:
I offer a range of specialized services in web development and professional design.
From luxury website design to advanced interface development, I help you build a strong digital presence.
services.web_design_desc: I design and develop professional websites that reflect your identity and achieve your goals with modern and premium style.
services.maintenance_desc: I help you update your old site, add new features, or maintain it regularly.
services.feature3: Fast loading and smooth user experience
services.feature4: Full support for both Arabic and English

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: We're proud to present a diverse range of our latest and finest projects developed for our clients, with modern technologies and contemporary designs

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Learn more about my journey and experience in web development
about.intro: I'm HSG, a web developer working on building responsive and user-friendly websites. I love turning ideas into real projects, and I always focus on code cleanliness, speed, and user experience.
about.exp1: Experience in designing and developing Front-End websites
about.exp2: Ability to convert any design into a real website
about.exp3: Great attention to detail and visual identity
about.exp4: Experience in deploying websites on servers and linking domains
about.exp5: Worked on over 25 websites for clients from different countries
